Package noppes.npcs.api.ability.type

Interface IAbilityOrb

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityAction, IAbilityEnergyProjectile
    public interface IAbilityOrb
extends IAbilityEnergyProjectile
    API interface for Orb abilities. Homing projectile sphere.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods

    • Method Detail

      • getOrbSpeed

        float getOrbSpeed()
        Returns:
        Travel speed of the orb in blocks per tick.

      • setOrbSpeed

        void setOrbSpeed​(float speed)
        Parameters:
        speed - Travel speed in blocks per tick.

      • getOrbSize

        float getOrbSize()
        Returns:
        Visual size (radius) of the orb in blocks.

      • setOrbSize

        void setOrbSize​(float size)
        Parameters:
        size - Orb size in blocks.

      • isHoming

        boolean isHoming()
        Returns:
        Whether the orb tracks its target.

      • setHoming

        void setHoming​(boolean homing)
        Parameters:
        homing - Whether to track the target.

      • getHomingStrength

        float getHomingStrength()
        Returns:
        Homing turn strength (higher = tighter turns).

      • setHomingStrength

        void setHomingStrength​(float strength)
        Parameters:
        strength - Homing turn strength.

      • getHomingRange

        float getHomingRange()
        Returns:
        Maximum distance at which homing activates, in blocks.

      • setHomingRange

        void setHomingRange​(float range)
        Parameters:
        range - Maximum homing activation range in blocks.

      • getRotationSpeed

        float getRotationSpeed()
        Returns:
        Visual rotation speed of the orb in degrees per tick.

      • setRotationSpeed

        void setRotationSpeed​(float speed)
        Parameters:
        speed - Rotation speed in degrees per tick.

      • getProjectileCount

        int getProjectileCount()
        Returns:
        Number of orb projectiles fired per use.

      • setProjectileCount

        void setProjectileCount​(int count)
        Parameters:
        count - Number of projectiles per use.

      • getFireDelay

        int getFireDelay()
        Returns:
        Delay in ticks between each projectile in a multi-projectile volley.

      • setFireDelay

        void setFireDelay​(int delay)
        Parameters:
        delay - Delay in ticks between projectiles.

      • getInnerColor

        int getInnerColor​(int projectileIndex)
        Parameters:
        projectileIndex - Projectile index.
        Returns:
        Inner color as a packed RGB integer.

        void setInnerColor​(int projectileIndex,
                   int color)
        Parameters:
        projectileIndex - Projectile index.
        color - Inner color as a packed RGB integer.

        Parameters:
        projectileIndex - Projectile index.
        Returns:
